untranslatable_reason: Signal requires sentiment indicators not in allowed list: (1) put/call ratio >1.2 — no PCR indicator available; (2) media sentiment scoring — no NLP/sentiment analysis indicators available; (3) capitulation pattern recognition — requires multi-bar candle pattern analysis beyond simple conditions. Approximation used volume spike as proxy for capitulation, but true capitulation detection (high volume down days + reversal attempts) cannot be accurately expressed with available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated 30% decline requirement using returns < -0.30. Used india_vix > 25 as proxy for extreme fear (VIX equivalent). Volume confirmation approximated with volume > hvol_20 (above 20-day historical average). Media negativity and specific capitulation patterns cannot be expressed with available indicators. Exit conditions: 75% gain (returns > 0.75), -15% hard stop (returns < -0.15), and 2-year hold max (730 days). Position is contrarian LONG in extreme bearish conditions. Regime set to HIGH_VOL and TRENDING_DOWN to match the reversal setup context.
